base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ground_tile_palette1 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Static ground-block tile using Palette 1 (Ground and Stone) — brown dirt with top grass-line highlight. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Static ground-block tile using Palette 1 (Ground and Stone) — brown dirt with top grass-line highlight; appears in overworld / underground / castle / underwater zone variants via palette swap only
